title: BackupListResponse
description: The definition of a backup create response body.

id.description: The ID of the backup. Must be URL-safe and work as a filesystem path, only lowercase, numbers, underscore, minus characters allowed.

classes.description: The list of collections (classes) for which the backup process was started.

startedAt.description: Timestamp when the backup process started

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the backup process completed (successfully or with failure)

size.description: Size of the backup in Gibs
